description: Persistent thermal cells from PHOENIX detections 2026-05-22..2026-05-29 that could not be auto-classified via OSM landuse match within 600m AND were not high-confidence vision-classifiable. Candidates for human review — could be agricultural burns, real fires not yet ground-truthed, or persistent thermals not on OSM.
